query:
SELECT configKey, 
  CASE 
    WHEN configValue IS NULL OR configValue = '' THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
    WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 12), '••••••••', RIGHT(configValue, 4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
    ELSE configValue
  END as value_preview,
  isSensitive,
  description,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey LIKE 'STRIPE%'
ORDER BY configKey;
command:

    ELSE configValue
  END as value_preview,
  isSensitive,
  description,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config
